creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Jan Beich from comment #1)
> __FreeBSD_version bump (OS ABI) usually caused by freebsd-update

Actually, freebsd-update usually changes -pX in "uname -r" output while __FreeBSD_version bumps are more common for -CURRENT. Either way poudriere will force-rebuild every package because it's oblivious whether just one binary has changed or low-level static library (like C runtime in /usr/lib/crt1.o) needs to be relinked into everything.
